examples: In the meantime, since my watchdog died today, you may take his place and guard my henhouse.
Barn eggs, sometimes called Percher, are laid by hens that have the freedom to roam a henhouse.
Then a fox snuck into Pixar's henhouse.
Because the work of guarding the henhouse has been subcontracted, in large measure, to foxes.
Critics of self-regulation call it a case of the fox guarding the henhouse.
